item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s01","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 correctly identifies the repeated local-patch pattern and refuses another entrance-page note. Turn 2 maintains the brake under deadline pressure, does not provide the requested patch text or implementation instruction, and routes to upstream ownership and release-scope adjudication. No emergency concession is made, so the bounded-emergency elements are not required."}
